g.text: Variant Mapping Failure in the Personal-Genome Pipeline

text.style: font-size: 8.8px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Nimbus Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #5f6b7a

g.text: What failed: process_variants() computed the right sequence-relative fields, but the notebook wrote raw genomic positions into the Zarr store.

g.text: to the sequence, so within one subtype

text.style: font-size: 7.8px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Nimbus Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #1f2933

g.text: Example from the broken store: A1CF stored pos = 50,816,728.

text.style: font-size: 8.2px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Nimbus Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #a61b29

g.text: The loader checked pos < 524,288, so that variant was skipped immediately.
